doc.field: Collection processed by Finding aid prepared by Alta Macadam
Subseries B: The Interior and the Collection
5 Historic Albums mostly of the interior and works of art at present in the Collection or probably formerly once belonging to it.
Subseries B: The Interior and the Collection
5 Historic Albums mostly of the interior and works of art at present in the Collection or probably formerly once belonging to it.

This is canvas-bound album with photos almost all of painted panels and screens or furniture in the interior of Villa La Pietra (series II.B.1.), in one of the Villas (series II.C.) or a work of art illustrating the Actons' activity as collectors (series IV.A.). None of these were pasted on to the page and so they were all removed in 2004 and replaced by Color photocopies. A number of pages at the end of the album are un-numbered and without photos. The pages are not numbered but many of the photographs are numbered on the page on labels, and these have not been countersigned with a 'tick'. Some of the pages also bear initials and a second label, sometimes blank and sometimes with another number (but these appear to be of little interest and so have not all been noted below). For easy reference the album pages have been numbered by the archivist in pencil on the top right-hand corner.

Series II: Villa La Pietra >> Subseries B: The Interior and the Collection >> 5 Historic Albums mostly of the interior and works of art at present in the Collection or probably formerly once belonging to it. >> Folder 3. Album labelled "IX Doppione"
Subseries B: The Interior and the Collection
5 Historic Albums mostly of the interior and works of art at present in the Collection or probably formerly once belonging to it.
